prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in: 1. `kubernetes/kubernetes` under `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/` that configure `DialTimeout`. 2. `etcd-io/etcd` under `client/` and `server/` that define or use `DialTimeout`. Exclude vendored files and test files — focus on production source code.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the kubernetes-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in: 1. `kubernetes/kubernetes` under `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/` that configure `DialTimeout`. 2. `etcd-io/etcd` under `client/` and `server/` that define or use `DialTimeout`. Exclude vendored files and test files — focus on production source code.
